title: pulsatilla × bolzanensis
intro: Pulsatilla × bolzanensis is a hybrid plant species, resulting from the cross between Pulsatilla occidentalis and Pulsatilla occidentalis subsp. yukonensis, commonly known as the western pasque flower. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pulsatilla × bolzanensis are said to include relief from menstrual cramps, insomnia, and anxiety, as well as soothing skin irritations and wounds. Pulsatilla × bolzanensis can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
